label: The Black Ledger
description: The Black Ledger occupies a soot-darkened brick house buttressed with riveted iron bands, set hard against Cindervale’s rebuilt masonry and its militarized trade lanes. Inside, a scarred oak bar and long communal tables sit beneath rafters webbed with chain-hung lamps, their light kept low behind smoke-stained glass. A wall of posted ordinances, toll schedules, and licensing notices functions as an informal civic bulletin, echoing the city’s culture of codified emergency law. A narrow counting alcove with barred shutters and a stamped-tile hearth signals the establishment’s long accommodation with quarantine rules and interdiction nights.
